title: Lesson 45 (Vocab) - デート, ドア, カード...
description: デート (Date) and ドア (Door). These are high-frequency "Free" vocab.

items.gloss: date (with someone); (social) outing (for two); date night; date (day)

card (information, filing, etc.); card (greetings, congratulations, etc.); (Western) playing cards; credit card; debit card; match; game; grouping in a competition or tournament; dough scraper; spatula
decoration; ornamental item; decompensated congestive heart failure
